subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the Lord of Names unto him who hath quaffed, in His path, the cup of destiny, that he may soar upon twin wings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدن مالک الاسماء الی الذی شرب فی سبیله کاس القضا لیطیر بجناحین
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
